summary: Completed comprehensive testing of ytranscript YouTube transcript creator app. Fixed critical backend API issues and verified all frontend functionality works correctly.

fixed_issues.issue: youtube-transcript-api integration broken due to incorrect method calls
fixed_issues.fix: Updated API calls from YouTubeTranscriptApi.list_transcripts() to ytt_api.list() and fixed data structure conversion

fixed_issues.issue: yt-dlp binary not found in PATH when called from backend
fixed_issues.fix: Updated subprocess calls to use full path /root/.venv/bin/yt-dlp

passed_tests: Backend transcript endpoint with invalid URL validation
Backend transcript endpoint with valid YouTube URL
Backend transcript endpoint with language parameter
Frontend homepage loads with correct UI elements
URL input field accepts YouTube URLs
Get Transcript button disabled when input empty
Transcript fetching for real YouTube video
Footer with GitHub and Twitter links visible
